## Contribution checklist

- [ ] Analysis code is minimal and uses base R / common packages only
- [ ] Simulation has a clearly stated **true** parameter
- [ ] Chapter reports bias, `se_ratio`, and coverage via `print_eval()`
- [ ] Any bias / under-coverage / caveat is stated in the text
- [ ] Seeds are fixed and `sessionInfo()` is printed
- [ ] New packages (if any) added to `install.R`
- [ ] `quarto render` (or `quarto preview <file>`) succeeds locally
